info.title: Green Flag Award Foundation API
info.description: Slice 3 registration API plus identity/RBAC/audit foundation endpoints.

get.summary: Return baseline contract metadata for scaffold validation.
Return the resolved authenticated actor profile.

post.summary: Submit a park registration with eligibility and duplicate checks.
Return mock W3W, OS, and ONS location suggestions requiring applicant confirmation.

get.summary: List verified registrations awaiting admin review.
Return applicant dashboard items with safe display statuses.

post.summary: Create or continue a Full Assessment application draft.

patch.summary: Autosave an application section with optimistic concurrency.

post.summary: Record a draft response to previous judge feedback.
Submit an applicant package and create a lower-env invoice shell.

get.summary: Return submitted application and payment state.
Return applicant-visible invoice and payment summary.

patch.summary: Record PO number or no-PO declaration for an invoice.

post.summary: Manually mark a lower-env invoice as paid.
Apply a documented Super Admin payment block override.
Run lower-env payment deadline block checks.

get.summary: Return admin dashboard queue counts and safe operational metrics.
Return admin park/application detail read model.
Return safe allocation readiness prerequisites without candidate generation.
Return the authenticated assessor profile read model.
List admin assessor profile read models.

post.summary: Create an assessor profile linked to an internal user.
Hold a draft allocation without notifying judges.
Release a held allocation to assigned judges.

get.summary: List released assignments for the authenticated assessor.

post.summary: Schedule a visit for an assigned assessment.

get.summary: Read admin assessment detail for an episode.
Read admin result detail for an episode.

post.summary: Run lower-env renewal reminder queue job.

ApplicantMessageThreadsResponse.description: Applicant-safe message projection without participant actor ids, sender actor ids, or visibility internals.

ApplicantMessageCommandResponse.description: Applicant-safe message command response without participant actor ids, sender actor ids, or visibility internals.
